calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-09-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Conrad Donner and Edward Koplowitz for Executor.

Mr. Donner stated that he had no additional matters to add. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-14-2014 Continued To May-05-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Conrad Donner and Ed Koplowitz for Ronald Soong.

The accounting petition was continued to May 5, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Counsel to file a declaration and or time sheets for ordinary fees to determine if extraordinary fees are appropriate. Said declaration is due by April 30, 2014. The matter will be deemed under submission on May 5, 2014.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)
